title: Merge Intervals
description: Given N intervals [start,end], merge all overlapping intervals and print merged intervals sorted by start.
output_format: Merged intervals, one per line: start end

solutions.python:
n = int(input())

intervals = []
for _ in range(n):
    s, e = map(int, input().split())
    intervals.append((s, e))

# Sort by start
intervals.sort()

cs, ce = intervals[0]

for i in range(1, n):
    if intervals[i][0] <= ce:
        ce = max(ce, intervals[i][1])
    else:
        print(cs, ce)
        cs, ce = intervals[i]

print(cs, ce)
